# TS9801

**Category:** Operators · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
Binary operator '{operator}' requires exactly 1 parameter (the right operand)
```

## Explanation

Operator methods follow the pattern: left.operator(right)

Correct:
  @operator("+")
  add(other: Vector): Vector { ... }  // 1 param for right side

Incorrect:
  @operator("+")
  add(a: Vector, b: Vector): Vector { ... }  // Too many params

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
